data.title: Crypto Insurance Sounds Great Until You Actually Need It—Here's The Ugly Truth
data.description: Coinbase, a well-known cryptocurrency exchange (NASDAQ: COIN), faced backlash after denying a claim of $100,000 worth of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) theft by a Coinbase One subscriber. This subscriber, Matthew Allan, who is the Chief Risk Officer at Intuit Inc. (NASDAQ: INTU), had almost $100,000 in Bitcoin stolen from his Coinbase account. Despite subscribing to Coinbase One's $29.99-a-month service, which promises up to $1 million in account protection, Allan was informed that he was not eligible for reimbursement due to not activating specific security settings outlined in the terms and conditions. Coinbase emphasized that customers are accountable for all account activities, even in the event of a security breach caused by outside sources. The situation led to a legal battle where Allan sued Coinbase, prompting the court to mandate the complaint be resolved through private arbitration. The outcome of the case remains uncertain as Allan may not... (remaining details available on Benzinga.com)

data.title: LEE'S FAMOUS RECIPE CHICKEN EXPANDS IN SOUTH CAROLINA WITH SIX NEW LOCATIONS
data.description: Franchisee Harris Mullis, who owns and operates a Lee's Famous Recipe® Chicken outlet in Rock Hill, South Carolina, is driving growth for the brand. With intentions to establish six new locations in the state, Mullis is spearheading the expansion efforts. This development comes as part of the franchise's broader push for growth and market penetration. The award-winning franchisee's strategic approach is expected to significantly contribute to the increase in Lee's Famous Recipe® Chicken outlets and is likely to bolster the brand's presence in the region.

data.title: Grupo Aeroportuario del Pacifico Announces the Obtaining of Independent Assurance on the KPI of Its Sustainability-Linked Bonds “GAP 22L,” “GAP 23L,” “GAP 23-2L,” “GAP 24L,” and “GAP 24-2L”
data.description: In Guadalajara, Mexico, on March 23, 2026, Grupo Aeroportuario del Pacífico, S.A.B. de C.V. (NYSE: PAC; BMV: GAP) announced updates regarding its sustainability-linked bonds, specifically referred to as “GAP 22L,” “GAP 23L,” “GAP 23-2L,” “GAP 24L,” and “GAP 24-2L.” The Company has successfully secured the necessary assurance as per its Sustainability-Linked Financing Frameworks. This includes verification of emissions inventory by Ruby Canyon and a limited assurance report by KPMG Cárdenas Dosal, S.C., an independent entity, concerning the Key Performance Indicator linked to these bonds.

data.title: LangChain debuts agent eval checklist for AI devs; assess AI agents w/ error, deployment tests. More details available.
data.description: LangChain has introduced a comprehensive agent evaluation readiness checklist aimed at assessing AI agents. Covering areas from error analysis to production deployment, this framework offers a practical approach to testing. This checklist aligns with industry standards and is designed to ensure thorough evaluation. For more information, refer to the complete article.

data.title: These Analysts Cut Their Forecasts On WhiteFiber Following Q4 Loss
data.description: WhiteFiber, Inc. (NASDAQ: WYFI) has reported a larger loss for the fourth quarter. The company, based in New York, revealed a Q4 GAAP loss per share of 67 cents, surpassing the estimated 18-cent loss. Additionally, the revenue of $23.561 million fell short of the projected $23.791 million. Despite this, total revenue experienced a year-over-year increase of 61% to $23.6 million, while the net loss grew from $1.0 million to $1.5 million. Adjusted EBITDA saw an uptick to $5.8 million from $5.5 million. The company stated, "We completed our initial..." For the full story, refer to Benzinga.com.

data.title: Darkroom Appoints Former IPG and dentsu Commerce Leader J. William Margaritis as SVP of Strategy
data.description: In New York on March 27, 2026, Darkroom, an AI-focused marketing agency known for generating over $5 billion in commerce revenue, has welcomed J. William Margaritis as the new Senior Vice President of Strategy. This appointment highlights the company's increased focus on enterprise commerce as it looks to further expand its impact in the industry.

data.title: Axway Positioned as a Leader in the IDC MarketScape: Worldwide API Management 2026 Vendor Assessment
data.description: A company based in Scottsdale, Arizona, known as Axway, operating under the ticker symbol 74SW on Euronext, has been recognized as a Leader in the IDC MarketScape: Worldwide API Management 2026 Vendor Assessment. Axway specializes in federated API management and enterprise integration. Their flagship product, Axway Amplify, is designed to securely connect, orchestrate, and automate data integration processes. This solution is widely used across various sectors such as financial services, manufacturing, and healthcare to modernize integrations and unlock data securely. Axway's achievement underscores its position as a global leader in the industry.

data.title: Cadence Education Honors Two Greater Minneapolis-St. Paul Educators for Over 30 Years of Service with School Dedications
data.description: Two preschool directors in Roseville and Oakdale have been commended for their commitment to early childhood education in Minneapolis. Cadence Education is recognizing their combined 65 years of service in the field, highlighting their dedication to providing quality education to young children.

data.title: MicroCloud Hologram Inc. Reports 39.1% Increase in Total Revenue for Fiscal 2025
data.description: A technology company based in Shenzhen, China, MicroCloud Hologram Inc. (Nasdaq: HOLO) recently disclosed its annual report for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2025. The report has been submitted to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission.

data.title: Oak Valley Community Bank Named One of Central Valley’s Best Places to Work
data.description: Oakdale, California-based Oak Valley Community Bank, a subsidiary of Oak Valley Bancorp (NASDAQ: OVLY), has been awarded a spot on the list of the 2026 Best Places to Work in the Central Valley. This recognition is a result of employee feedback and independent evaluation carried out by Best Companies Group. Additionally, Oak Valley Community Bank was acknowledged by Opportunity Stanislaus for its contribution to "Growing the Economy" as they expanded their workforce by 10% or more in 2025. This achievement highlights the bank's commitment to its employees and economic development in the region.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq's Gloom Deepens On U.S.-Iran War News; Chevron Shines(Live Coverage)
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline following President Trump's extension of the deadline for Iran negotiations. During this time, oil prices surged. The Nasdaq saw further decreases in response to news of potential U.S.-Iran conflict. Notably, Chevron stood out among market performers.

data.title: Coinbase users resist prediction markets notifications amid legal scrutiny, alleging app pressures them to gamble.
data.description: As prediction market platforms face legal scrutiny in the United States, several users of Coinbase have voiced concerns that the app is encouraging them to engage in gambling activities.

data.title: Toll Brothers Announces Final Opportunity to Own a Luxury Home at CrossCreek in Cumming, Georgia
data.description: The last home in a prestigious community in Forsyth County is now available. This sought-after neighborhood has been quickly selling out, with only one home remaining. Located in a prime area of Forsyth County, this final home offers a unique opportunity for buyers. With all other homes already sold, this last property is sure to garner significant interest. Interested buyers should act quickly, as this is the final chance to secure a residence in this exclusive community. Contact now to arrange a viewing before this last home is also sold.

data.title: Parent company of NYSE invests $1.6B in prediction market Polymarket in a finalized deal.
data.description: The parent company of the New York Stock Exchange, Intercontinental Exchange, has made a significant investment of $1.6 billion into the prediction market platform Polymarket.
